generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components //
instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor driving the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot, providing rotational output for the gear transmission system with maximum angular velocity of 75°/s."
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox component of the first axis with backlash effects and friction phenomena (static, kinetic, viscous) within the restricted working range [-90°, 90°]."
]

instance GearWheel : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Intermediate gearwheel in the transmission system between motor and cycloidal gearbox, contributing to torque multiplication and friction characteristics."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted on the motor shaft providing angular position data with reduced backlash uncertainty for friction analysis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderData
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted behind the gearbox providing secondary angular position data to infer gearbox elasticity and friction characteristics."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderData
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring motor current (I_M) as input to the motor for torque derivation and friction modeling."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentData
]

instance SinumerikController : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl. CNC controller providing time-series data (target/actual position, velocity, acceleration) via MQTT streaming for real-time system monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:producedData ControllerTimeSeriesData
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance MotorEncoderData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
    base:desc "Raw and processed angular position data from motor encoder used for gearbox elasticity and friction analysis."
]

instance SecondaryEncoderData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
    base:desc "Angular position data from secondary encoder behind gearbox for backlash and friction characterization."
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
    base:desc "Motor current measurements (I_M) used for torque derivation and friction model input."
]

instance ControllerTimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SinumerikController
    base:desc "MQTT-streamed time-series data including position, velocity, acceleration commands and actual measurements for system validation."
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance SysMLStructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram (BDD) and Internal Block Diagram (IBD) describing structural composition of first axis components (motor, gearwheel, cycloidal gearbox) and flow definitions."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLTool
]

instance TorqueVelocityDerivationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Data calculation model computing torque (τ) and angular velocity (ω) from motor current (I_M) using manufacturer-provided motor constants."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulink
]

instance FrictionlessGearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Base MATLAB Simulink model representing frictionless ideal behavior of the cycloidal gearbox for comparison with measured data."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulink
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Executable MATLAB Simulink implementation of Coulomb-Viscous friction model for the gearbox with parameterized coefficients."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulink
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Executable MATLAB Simulink implementation of Stribeck friction model accounting for Stribeck effect in the gearbox."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulink
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Executable MATLAB Simulink implementation of Dahl friction model for dynamic friction characterization."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulink
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Executable MATLAB Simulink implementation of LuGre friction model for detailed friction dynamics analysis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulink
]

instance MotorOutputSimulation : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Component-specific simulation model for motor output dynamics (Simulation M) used in friction analysis pipeline."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulink
]

instance GearWheelOutputSimulation : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Component-specific simulation model for gearwheel output dynamics (Simulation GW) used in friction analysis pipeline."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulink
]

instance SystemOutputSimulation : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Component-specific simulation model for system output dynamics (Simulation GB) including all friction effects."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulink
]

instance MeasuredMotorCurrent : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw motor current measurements (I_M) transmitted from physical system for torque derivation."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TorqueVelocityDerivationModel
]

instance MeasuredMotorPosition : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular position data (θ_M) from motor encoder used for system validation and friction analysis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MotorOutputSimulation
]

instance MeasuredGearboxPosition : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular position data (θ_G) from secondary encoder behind gearbox for backlash and friction characterization."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryEncoderData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GearWheelOutputSimulation
]

instance SystemTimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data (position, velocity, acceleration) from SINUMERIK controller for real-time system validation."
    DTDFVocab:fromData ControllerTimeSeriesData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SystemOutputSimulation
]

instance DerivedMotorTorque : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Computed motor torque (τ_M) derived from motor current (I_M) using manufacturer constants."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MeasuredMotorCurrent
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TorqueVelocityDerivationModel
]

instance DerivedGearboxTorque : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Computed gearbox output torque (τ_G) derived from input torque (τ_M) and gear ratios."
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedMotorTorque
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GearWheelOutputSimulation
]

instance SimulatedMotorOutput : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated motor output (δr_M) representing frictionless ideal behavior for comparison with measured data."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MeasuredMotorPosition
]

instance SimulatedGearboxOutput : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated gearbox output (δr_G) incorporating friction models for validation against measured data."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MeasuredGearboxPosition
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CoulombViscousFrictionModel
]

instance SimulatedSystemOutput : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated system output (δr_out) representing complete friction-compensated behavior for analysis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SystemTimeSeriesData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo LuGreFrictionModel
]

// C11: Enablers
instance SysMLTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML 1.7 tool used for structural and behavioral modeling of the robot's first axis components and flow definitions."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionAnalysisService
]

instance MatlabSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink environment executing friction models (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre) and system simulations."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionAnalysisService
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelValidationService
]

instance MQTTProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol enabling real-time sensor data streaming from SINUMERIK 840D sl. controller to digital shadow."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataIngestionService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell framework providing metadata standard for linking data traces to physical assets (e.g., mapping I_M to motor)."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataAggregationService
]

instance CustomDashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom visualization dashboard displaying measured vs. simulated data with traceability links to models and sources."
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

// C6: Services
instance FrictionAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time friction identification service using multi-physics-aware detection of joint friction (Coulomb, viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre models) with white-box and black-box approaches."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionCharacterizationInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelParameterUpdateAction
]

instance ModelValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model validation and discrepancy analysis service comparing simulated frictionless behavior against measured data to quantify torque/velocity mismatches."
    DTDFVocab:provides DiscrepancyAnalysisInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlOptimizationAction
]

instance DataIngestionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data ingestion service transforming raw sensor data (encoder readings, current measurements) into higher-level abstractions for analysis."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataAggregationInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalRecommendationAction
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Unified visualization service displaying measured vs. simulated data with interactive exploration capabilities for friction effect analysis."
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualAnalyticsInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance FrictionCharacterizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Quantification of static, kinetic, and viscous friction in the gearbox enabling control algorithm tuning and wear pattern identification."
]

instance DiscrepancyAnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Quantitative analysis of deviations between simulated frictionless behavior and measured data to identify system inaccuracies."
]

instance DataAggregationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Transformation of raw sensor data into higher-level abstractions (e.g., gearbox output torque τ_G, system output torque τ_out)."
]

instance VisualAnalyticsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization of friction effects and system dynamics enabling root-cause analysis of motion inaccuracies."
]

instance ModelParameterUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Suggests adjustments to friction model parameters (e.g., Coulomb coefficients) based on real-time data discrepancies."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ControlOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enables adaptive control strategies by compensating for friction in real-time through model-based adjustments."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance OperationalRecommendationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Identifies wear patterns or temperature-dependent friction to inform maintenance schedules or tooling changes."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C1: Environment
instance FirstAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical environment containing the first axis components (motor, gearwheel, cycloidal gearbox) with restricted working range [-90°, 90°]."
    base:contains MotorActuator
    base:contains GearWheel
    base:contains CycloidalGearbox
]

// C5: Components
instance FirstAxisComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Structural component representing the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot including motor, gearwheel, and cycloidal gearbox assembly."
    base:isContainedIn FirstAxisEnvironment
]

instance DigitalShadow : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Centralized single-instance digital shadow focused on friction analysis of the first axis with purpose-driven concretization of Digital Shadow Reference Model."
    base:isContainedIn FirstAxisEnvironment
    base:contains SysMLStructuralModel
    base:contains TorqueVelocityDerivationModel
    base:contains FrictionlessGearboxModel
    base:contains CoulombViscousFrictionModel
    base:contains StribeckFrictionModel
    base:contains DahlFrictionModel
    base:contains LuGreFrictionModel
    base:contains MotorOutputSimulation
    base:contains GearWheelOutputSimulation
    base:contains SystemOutputSimulation
    base:contains MeasuredMotorCurrent
    base:contains MeasuredMotorPosition
    base:contains MeasuredGearboxPosition
    base:contains SystemTimeSeriesData
    base:contains DerivedMotorTorque
    base:contains DerivedGearboxTorque
    base:contains SimulatedMotorOutput
    base:contains SimulatedGearboxOutput
    base:contains SimulatedSystemOutput
    base:contains SysMLTool
    base:contains MatlabSimulink
    base:contains MQTTProtocol
    base:contains AssetAdministrationShell
    base:contains CustomDashboard
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The digital shadow operates in **real-time**, processing live data streams with **millisecond-scale granularity** (implied by MQTT streaming and sensor updates). The system synchronizes with the physical twin (PT) at the **frequency of sensor measurements** (not explicitly quantified but inferred to be high-resolution for friction analysis). The **latency** for data processing and visualization is not specified but is assumed to be minimal for real-time applications."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The digital twin constellation is organized as follows:
   - **Centralized Architecture**: A **single digital shadow** instance is created for the **first axis**, with **no decentralized twins** for other axes.
   - **Component Orchestration**:
     - **Sources**: Physical sensors (encoders, current sensors) and the CNC controller.
     - **Processing Components**: Simulation M (motor), Simulation GW (gearwheel), Simulation GB (gearbox) execute **friction models** and derive outputs.
     - **Data Traces**: Flow from **sources → processing → output**, with **metadata enrichment** (e.g., source identification, timestamps).
     - **Visualization Layer**: Aggregates data for **dashboard display** and **discrepancy analysis**.
   - **Interaction Flow**:
     1. **Physical data** (e.g., I_M, encoder readings) is ingested via MQTT.
     2. **Processing components** (Simulink models) compute **simulated outputs** (e.g., ˆr_G).
     3. **Data traces** are linked to **engineering models** (SysML) for semantic context.
     4. **Results** are visualized in a dashboard for **friction analysis and control optimization**.
   The constellation adheres to the **Digital Shadow Reference Model (DSRM)**, with **purpose-driven customization** for friction modeling."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital twin operates primarily during the **operational phase** of the robot’s life cycle, focusing on **as-operated** (real-world) behavior rather than **as-designed** or **as-manufactured** representations. It complements **model-based software engineering (MBSE)** approaches by:
   - **Validating the physical system’s behavior** against **engineering models** (e.g., SysML structural models, Simulink friction models).
   - **Enabling continuous improvement** of friction models during operation (e.g., adapting to wear or temperature drifts).
   The DT does not cover **design-time phases** (e.g., conceptual or detailed design) but is **deployed post-manufacturing** to enhance **runtime performance**."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The fidelity and validity of the digital twin are ensured through:
   - **Model Validation**:
     - **Comparison of simulated vs. measured data**: Discrepancies in torque (τ) and angular velocity (ω) are analyzed to **identify friction effects**.
     - **Parameter tuning**: Friction models (e.g., Coulomb-Viscous) are **calibrated against real-world data** to minimize errors.
   - **Uncertainty Sources**:
     - **Sensor noise**: Encoder readings and current measurements may introduce **measurement errors**.
     - **Model simplifications**: Analytical friction models (white-box) may **overlook dynamic effects** (e.g., temperature-dependent friction).
     - **Backlash**: Gearbox elasticity and backlash are **partially mitigated** by dual encoders but not fully modeled.
   - **Verification Mechanisms**:
     - **Traceability**: Each data trace is linked to its **source (sensor/model)** and **computational lineage** (e.g., which Simulink block generated it).
     - **Metadata**: Includes **system properties** (e.g., gearbox configuration) to contextualize data.
   - **Uncertainty Quantification**: Not explicitly quantified but implied through **discrepancy analysis** between ideal and measured behavior."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The digital twin connects to the physical system via:
  - **Data Protocol**: **MQTT** for streaming sensor data (*I_M*, encoder outputs) from the **Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl controller** to the digital shadow.
  - **Network Architecture**: Implied to be **Industrial Ethernet** (standard for CNC controllers), though not explicitly named.
  - **Data Flow**: **One-way, asynchronous**, with no feedback to the physical system. The connection supports **real-time synchronization** of live data for friction analysis."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The digital twin is **hosted on a computational platform** (not specified) that supports:
   - **MATLAB Simulink**: For executing **friction models** and **dynamic simulations**.
   - **MQTT Broker**: For **real-time data ingestion** from the SINUMERIK 840D sl. controller.
   - **Dashboard Software**: Likely a **custom web-based or desktop application** for visualization (e.g., using Python/Dash or MATLAB’s built-in tools).
   The deployment is **application-specific**, integrated into the **robot’s control environment** for **runtime friction analysis**. No cloud hosting or distributed deployment is mentioned."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The digital twin adheres to the following standards:
  - **SysML (Systems Modeling Language)**: Used for structural and behavioral modeling of the robot’s first axis (ISO/IEC 19506).
  - **Asset Administration Shell (AAS)**: Implemented for asset description and contextualization (ISO/IEC 4000-2).
  - **MQTT (Message Queuing Telemetry Transport)**: Standard protocol for real-time data streaming (OASIS Standard).
  - **Digital Shadow Reference Model (DSRM)**: A domain-specific reference model for digital shadows, though not a formalized standard."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The digital shadow system incorporates the following security and safety aspects:
  - **Passive operation**: The digital shadow does not execute **remote control commands** on the physical twin, adhering to a **one-way data flow** paradigm.
  - **Safety cell integration**: The robot’s **safety cell restricts the working range to [-90°, 90°]** and **maximum speed (75°/s)**, mitigating risks from unmonitored operations.
  - **Data isolation**: No explicit mention of **encryption** or **access controls**, but the **passive nature** reduces exposure to cyber threats. The system does not support **remote actuation**, limiting safety risks to the physical twin."
]
